import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        if not in_num
          in_num = true
          cur = 0
          sign = 1
        end
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        in_num = true
        cur = 0
        sign = -1
      else
        if in_num
          if count < 2
            nums = [if count == 0 then sign * cur else nums[0] end, if count == 1 then sign * cur else nums[1] end]
            count = count + 1
          end
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if count < 2
      nums = [if count == 0 then sign * cur else nums[0] end, if count == 1 then sign * cur else nums[1] end]
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
